name: Custom Starter
description: Minimal memory template with just the essentials. Start here and add more memory files as you discover what Claude needs to know about you.

memories.name: User Role
memories.description: Who you are and what you do — the foundation for personalized assistance
content_prompts: What is your name and primary role or job title?
What do you spend most of your time doing in this project or workspace?
Is there anything unique about your situation that would help Claude assist you better?
memories.example_content:
---
type: user
name: User Role
description: Basic identity and role context for personalized Claude assistance
---

- Name: [Your name], [your role]
- Primary work: [what you do day-to-day]
- Context: [anything Claude should always keep in mind]

memories.name: Preferences
memories.description: How you like things done — communication style, output format, and workflow habits
content_prompts: How do you prefer Claude to communicate with you (concise vs. detailed, formal vs. casual)?
Are there output formats you prefer (bullet points, prose, code-first, etc.)?
What should Claude always do or never do when helping you?
memories.example_content:
---
type: feedback
name: Preferences
description: Communication and output preferences for consistent Claude behavior
---

- Style: [concise/detailed], [formal/casual]
- Format: [bullets/prose/code-first]
- Always: [things Claude should always do]
- Never: [things Claude should never do]
